note: Surface triage for EigenLayer StrategyManager (v1.12.0 impl 0x88582996...0d394). LST deposit entry point. signed_structs holds the off-chain Deposit EIP-712 grant consumed by depositIntoStrategyWithSignature.

0xe7a050aa.name: depositIntoStrategy
0xe7a050aa.reason: user-fund-move — deposit ERC-20 LST into a strategy, minting restaking shares to caller. (address strategy, address token, uint256 amount). Core restaking deposit.

0x32e89ace.name: depositIntoStrategyWithSignature
0x32e89ace.reason: relayer-submit — depositIntoStrategyWithSignature is submitted by a relayer; the staker's risk is captured at the off-chain `Deposit` EIP-712 sign (signed_structs.Deposit, COVER). Same as Morpho setAuthorizationWithSig precedent. On-chain calldata excluded; off-chain sign covered.

0x50ff7225.name: addShares
0x50ff7225.reason: infra/onlyDelegationManager — internal share crediting on withdrawal completion. Not user-callable.

0x724af423.name: removeDepositShares
0x724af423.reason: infra/onlyDelegationManager — internal share removal when queueing withdrawal. Not user-callable.

0x2eae418c.name: withdrawSharesAsTokens
0x2eae418c.reason: infra/onlyDelegationManager — internal: redeem shares to underlying tokens during completeQueuedWithdrawal. Not user-callable.

0x4b6d5d6e.name: burnShares
0x4b6d5d6e.reason: infra — burns shares of a slashed/redistributed strategy; protocol accounting, not a wallet action.

0x88c10299.name: clearBurnOrRedistributableShares
0x88c10299.reason: infra/keeper — clears the burn-or-redistribute queue for an operator set; slashing settlement plumbing.

0x2d44def6.name: clearBurnOrRedistributableSharesByStrategy
0x2d44def6.reason: infra/keeper — per-strategy variant of burn/redistribute clearing.

0x3fb99ca5.name: increaseBurnOrRedistributableShares
0x3fb99ca5.reason: infra/onlyDelegationManager — records slashed shares to be burned/redistributed. Not user-callable.

0x5de08ff2.name: addStrategiesToDepositWhitelist
0x5de08ff2.reason: governance — onlyStrategyWhitelister; adds strategies to the deposit whitelist.

0xc6656702.name: setStrategyWhitelister
0xc6656702.reason: governance — onlyOwner; set the whitelister role.

Deposit.reason: off-chain EIP-712 message a staker SIGNS to authorize depositIntoStrategyWithSignature on their behalf. typehash Deposit(address staker,address strategy,address token,uint256 amount,uint256 nonce,uint256 expiry) — VERIFIED against live on-chain DEPOSIT_TYPEHASH 0x4337f82d...9224. Domain {name:'EigenLayer', version:'1', chainId:1, verifyingContract: StrategyManager proxy}. Grants a relayer the right to move the staker's tokens into a strategy — an off-chain fund-move authorization.
